synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-20914 Oracle Linux 9 .NET 8.0 bug fix and enhancement update

full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20914

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20914.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
aspnetcore-runtime-8.0-8.0.21-2.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
aspnetcore-runtime-dbg-8.0-8.0.21-2.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
